# connectracer_wisdom_knowledge_bases (Data Source)

Fetches a list of AWS Wisdom knowledge bases



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier
- `knowledge_bases` (Attributes List) List of knowledge bases (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--knowledge_bases))

<a id="nestedatt--knowledge_bases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `knowledge_bases`

Read-Only:

- `knowledge_base_arn` (String) The ARN of the knowledge base
- `knowledge_base_id` (String) The ID of the knowledge base
- `knowledge_base_type` (String) The type of the knowledge base
- `name` (String) The name of the knowledge base
- `status` (String) The status of the knowledge base
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags associated with the knowledge base
